empty.cap: No load. The drone knows its own weight, so it holds the line and stays inside the safe zone.

load.sub: the check is blind to the load
load.cap: An unknown load on a cable. The safety check is on, but it is still checking the empty drone, so the swinging load drags the drone wide, out through the side of the safe zone.

empty.cap: No load. The drone knows its own weight, so it holds the line and stays inside the safe zone.

load.sub: the check is blind to the load
load.cap: An unknown load on a cable. The safety check is on, but it is still checking the empty drone, so the swinging load drags the drone down, out through the floor of the safe zone.
